creator: feisal@uwi.tt
text:
The system in question is running 3.4 and I am trying to upgrade to 4.1.
All proceeds fine until I get to the partionion editor.  I see one IDE
disk but not the SCSI disk in the editor.  This persists even if I select
novice or custom install.  The problem exists in 4.0-release and 4.1-release.
I have attached a dmesg from the 3.4 system.

=======dmesg========

How-To-Repeat: Try installing 4.1 or 4.0 on a disk on an Advansys controller
